TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Don Anielak sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1930, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 11, Don Anielak, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1995) mtzyaw mrhuw na qyanux aring qutux sen qeru kbhul mzimal payat kawas(1954) tehok qutux sen qeru kbhul mzimal magal kawas(1955) Anielak mzyu mari sazing pspung ryax maki Moberly pqwasan biru.suruw lga,musa Southwest Missouri krahu pqwasan biru,hiya 1952-1954 kawas maki qasa mzyu mari. hiya ru Bradley msqun mzyu mari,1951 kawas pspung ryax,te qutux pspung mgyay la. 1953 kawas 1 byacing,Anielak magal 39 分 maki Missouri . 1989 kawas Southwest Missouri .tmwang 田徑 名人堂 pincyogan nya masoq krahu' pqwasan biru lga, Anielak te cyugal lahuy(26 順位) tmwang New York Knicks maki 1954 kawas ru 1954 kawas 8 byacing mzyu mari hlahuy biru. .1954 kawas 11 byacing,hiya mhtuw Knicks magal cyugal 分. tman sgleng pincyogan masoq lga,Anielak ga sinsiy maki Charles na Peter's pqwasan biru,suruw lga,maki Ramsey Illinois cyugal pspung magal 56-18戰績 ru musa Williamsville qeru pspung magal 134-55戰績 1972 kawas,sinsiy pincyogan nya maki Missouri Koshkonong pqwasan biru. 1974 kawas musa Illinois na North Boone pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *on anielak s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *on anielak, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mtzjaw mrħuw na qjanux ariŋ qutux s~ɕen qeru kβħul mzimal pajat kawas~ɕ(****) teħok qutux s~ɕen qeru kβħul mzimal maɣal kawas~ɕ(****) anielak mzju mari s~ɕaziŋ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax maki moβerlj pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕuruw lɣa,mus~ɕa s~ɕoutħwes~ɕt mis~ɕs~ɕouri kraħu pqwas~ɕan βiru,ħija ****-**** kawas~ɕ maki qas~ɕa mzju mari. ħija ru βra*lej ms~ɕqun mzju mari,**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax,te qutux ps~ɕpuŋ mɣjaj la. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,anielak maɣal ** * maki mis~ɕs~ɕouri . **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕoutħwes~ɕt mis~ɕs~ɕouri .tmwaŋ ** *** pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja mas~ɕoq kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa, anielak te ʦ~ʨjuɣal laħuj(** **) tmwaŋ new jork kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ maki **** kawas~ɕ ru **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mzju mari ħlaħuj βiru. .**** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,ħija mħtuw kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ maɣal ʦ~ʨjuɣal *. tman s~ɕɣleŋ pinʦ~ʨjoɣan mas~ɕoq lɣa,anielak ɣa s~ɕins~ɕij maki ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ na peterʔs~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru,s~ɕuruw lɣa,maki rams~ɕej illinois~ɕ ʦ~ʨjuɣal ps~ɕpuŋ maɣal **-**** ru mus~ɕa williams~ɕ*ille qeru ps~ɕpuŋ maɣal ***-**** **** kawas~ɕ,s~ɕins~ɕij pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja maki mis~ɕs~ɕouri kos~ɕħkonoŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ mus~ɕa illinois~ɕ na nortħ βoone pqwas~ɕan βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Don Anielak sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1930, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 11, Don Anielak, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1995) mtzyaw mrhuw na qyanux aring qutux sen qeru kbhul mzimal payat kawas(1954) tehok qutux sen qeru kbhul mzimal magal kawas(1955) Anielak mzyu mari sazing pspung ryax maki Moberly pqwasan biru.suruw lga,musa Southwest Missouri krahu pqwasan biru,hiya 1952-1954 kawas maki qasa mzyu mari. hiya ru Bradley msqun mzyu mari,1951 kawas pspung ryax,te qutux pspung mgyay la. 1953 kawas 1 byacing,Anielak magal 39 分 maki Missouri . 1989 kawas Southwest Missouri .tmwang 田徑 名人堂 pincyogan nya masoq krahu' pqwasan biru lga, Anielak te cyugal lahuy(26 順位) tmwang New York Knicks maki 1954 kawas ru 1954 kawas 8 byacing mzyu mari hlahuy biru. .1954 kawas 11 byacing,hiya mhtuw Knicks magal cyugal 分. tman sgleng pincyogan masoq lga,Anielak ga sinsiy maki Charles na Peter's pqwasan biru,suruw lga,maki Ramsey Illinois cyugal pspung magal 56-18戰績 ru musa Williamsville qeru pspung magal 134-55戰績 1972 kawas,sinsiy pincyogan nya maki Missouri Koshkonong pqwasan biru. 1974 kawas musa Illinois na North Boone pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *on anielak s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *on anielak, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mtzjaw mrħuw na qjanux ariŋ qutux s~ɕen qeru kβħul mzimal pajat kawas~ɕ(****) teħok qutux s~ɕen qeru kβħul mzimal maɣal kawas~ɕ(****) anielak mzju mari s~ɕaziŋ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax maki moβerlj pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕuruw lɣa,mus~ɕa s~ɕoutħwes~ɕt mis~ɕs~ɕouri kraħu pqwas~ɕan βiru,ħija ****-**** kawas~ɕ maki qas~ɕa mzju mari. ħija ru βra*lej ms~ɕqun mzju mari,**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax,te qutux ps~ɕpuŋ mɣjaj la. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,anielak maɣal ** * maki mis~ɕs~ɕouri . **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕoutħwes~ɕt mis~ɕs~ɕouri .tmwaŋ ** *** pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja mas~ɕoq kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa, anielak te ʦ~ʨjuɣal laħuj(** **) tmwaŋ new jork kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ maki **** kawas~ɕ ru **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mzju mari ħlaħuj βiru. .**** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,ħija mħtuw kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ maɣal ʦ~ʨjuɣal *. tman s~ɕɣleŋ pinʦ~ʨjoɣan mas~ɕoq lɣa,anielak ɣa s~ɕins~ɕij maki ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ na peterʔs~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru,s~ɕuruw lɣa,maki rams~ɕej illinois~ɕ ʦ~ʨjuɣal ps~ɕpuŋ maɣal **-**** ru mus~ɕa williams~ɕ*ille qeru ps~ɕpuŋ maɣal ***-**** **** kawas~ɕ,s~ɕins~ɕij pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja maki mis~ɕs~ɕouri kos~ɕħkonoŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ mus~ɕa illinois~ɕ na nortħ βoone pqwas~ɕan βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
